plugins.name: rewrite
plugins.description: Reinsurance underwriting toolkit — regulr (ground-up loss ratio pricing from a submission) + reconintel (clause-by-clause treaty benchmarking vs an in-force portfolio) + replace (committee authorization-approval package: email-safe HTML request + authorization-terms PDF) + resus (sourced counterparty due diligence on cedent/MGA/TPA: open-web risk research + S&P Capital IQ statutory financials & Schedule P reserves, cited PDF report).
